papers.title_en: EM-Vid: Training-Free Entity-Centric Memory for Efficient and Consistent Multi-Shot Video Generation
papers.authors: Jente Vandersanden, Matheus Gadelha, Chun-Hao P. Huang, Hyeonho Jeong, Yulia Gryaditskaya
papers.evidence: 免训练的视频生成，基于实体中心记忆
papers.tldr: 多镜头视频生成需保持实体外观一致。现有全帧存储方法混淆了实体与场景信息，效率低。提出实体中心记忆，以潜在块索引存储实体信息，引入稀疏令牌注意力和结构化脚本。预算更新策略维护紧凑记忆，噪声注入控制外观。方法提高提示一致性并降低计算成本。
papers.abstract_en: Multi-shot video generation requires maintaining a consistent appearance of recurring entities across shots while remaining faithful to shot-specific text prompts. Recent autoregressive methods reuse previously generated frames as memory. However, full-frame storage entangles persistent entity information with transient scene context, leading to irrelevant information leakage and high computational cost. We propose an entity-centric memory in the form of an entity-indexed bank of latent patches. We introduce sparse token conditioning compatible with pretrained models, restricting self-attention to entity-relevant tokens and reducing computational cost. To support this, we introduce a structured multi-shot script format. We additionally propose a budgeted memory update strategy to maintain a compact, evolving memory. Finally, we equip the entity representation with a noise-injection mechanism that enables fine-grained appearance control, preventing leakage of irrelevant information. Our method improves prompt adherence and efficiency while preserving subject consistency.

papers.title_en: Φ-Noise: Training-Free Temporal Video Conditioning via Phase-Based Noise Manipulation
papers.authors: Ofir Abramovich, Nadav Z. Cohen, Adi Rosenthal, Ariel Shamir
papers.evidence: 基于相位噪声操作的免训练时间视频条件控制
papers.tldr: 现有视频扩散模型的条件生成方法往往需要额外训练和大量计算，限制了实用性。本文提出Φ-Noise，一种简单高效的无训练运动条件视频生成方法，核心思路是将参考视频的低频相位信息直接注入扩散噪声潜变量，从而在不修改模型架构或推理流程的前提下有效传递运动线索。该方法在多个应用场景中展示了对视频外观和动态的有效控制，且生成质量与需要额外训练的复杂条件方法相当或更优。这一工作揭示了频率分量在扩散模型中的重要作用，并为高效灵活的视频生成提供了新路径。
papers.abstract_en: Latent video diffusion models generate videos by progressively transforming Gaussian noise into realistic samples conditioned on text or visual inputs. However, existing conditioning methods often require additional training and computational overhead. Motivated by recent findings on the importance of frequency components in generative models, we propose a simple, training-free approach for motion-conditioned video generation by injecting low-frequency phase information from a reference video directly into the diffusion noise latents. Our method transfers motion cues without modifying the model architecture or inference pipeline. Using several applications, we demonstrate effective control over both appearance and dynamics in generated videos, while achieving competitive or superior results compared to more complex conditioning approaches.

papers.title_en: VPG: Visual Prefix Guidance for Autoregressive Image and Video Generation
papers.authors: Xinyao Liao, Qiyuan He, Yicong Li, Jiayin Zhu, Xiaoye Qu, Wei Wei, Angela Yao
papers.evidence: 针对自回归图像和视频生成的免训练推理时引导方法
papers.tldr: 自回归图像/视频生成模型存在暴露偏差和前缀漂移问题，现有引导方法侧重外部语义条件而非前缀自身支持。本文提出视觉前缀引导（VPG），在推理时通过对比生成前缀与损坏前缀的模型输出，外推logits以增强前缀后验支持，无需重训练。在VAR、Infinity和InfinityStar上，VPG分别提升class-conditional、text-to-image和text-to-video生成质量，FID平均降低0.36。
papers.abstract_en: Autoregressive image and video generators are trained with teacher-forced histories but must sample from their own generated prefixes at inference time, making them vulnerable to exposure bias and prefix drift. Existing remedies either modify training or apply sampling-time guidance aimed primarily at external semantic conditions, such as class labels or text prompts, rather than testing whether a next-step prediction provides strong posterior support for the generated prefix itself. We propose Visual Prefix Guidance (VPG), a training-free inference-time guidance method for autoregressive image and video generation. VPG improves next-step prediction by contrasting the model's output under the generated prefix with its output under a corrupted prefix, then extrapolating logits toward candidates that strengthen the posterior support of the generated prefix. Across class-conditional image generation with VAR, text-to-image generation with Infinity, and text-to-video generation with InfinityStar, VPG improves generation quality without retraining the base model, reducing FID on VAR by 0.36 on average and improving benchmark performance on both image and video generation.

papers.authors: Hadar Davidson, Noam Issachar, Sagie Benaim
papers.evidence: 用于图像生成的免训练彩色噪声采样
papers.tldr: 扩散模型在图像合成中表现出色，但传统SDE求解器注入均匀白噪声，未考虑生成轨迹的频谱偏差（先低频后高频）。本文提出Colored Noise Sampling (CNS)，一种无需训练的随机求解器，根据时间和频率动态调整噪声注入，更高效地将能量分配给未解析的频率带。实验表明，CNS在SiT-XL/2、JiT-B/16等架构上显著降低FID，例如无指导FID从8.26降至6.27。该方法作为即插即用的采样替换，有效利用频谱偏差提升生成质量。
papers.abstract_en: Diffusion models achieve state-of-the-art image synthesis, with their generative trajectories fundamentally exhibiting a spectral bias, resolving low-frequency global structures early and high-frequency fine details later. Conventional stochastic differential equation (SDE) solvers fail to account for this dynamic, naively injecting uniform white noise throughout the entire process and misusing the finite energy budget. In this work, we establish a mathematical framework that reconsiders SDE inference as a targeted, frequency-decoupled energy transfer. Leveraging this framework, we introduce Colored Noise Sampling (CNS), a novel, training-free stochastic solver. Rather than injecting uniform white noise, CNS utilizes a dynamic, timestep- and frequency-dependent schedule that more efficiently allocates injected energy toward structurally unresolved frequency bands. By actively exploiting the model's inherent spectral bias, CNS systematically steers the generated distribution toward the true data manifold. Extensive experiments demonstrate that CNS significantly outperforms standard ODE and SDE baselines as a strictly plug-and-play, inference-time sampler substitution across diverse architectures (SiT, JiT, FLUX). Compared to standard sampling on ImageNet-256, CNS achieves substantial unguided FID reductions, improving from 8.26 to 6.27 on SiT-XL/2, 32.39 to 26.69 on JiT-B/16, and 11.88 to 8.31 on JiT-H/16, while yielding consistent relative FID improvements with Classifier-Free Guidance. Project page is available at https://hadardavidson.github.io/CNS/.

papers.title_en: SEGA: Spectral-Energy Guided Attention for Resolution Extrapolation in Diffusion Transformers
papers.authors: Javad Rajabi, Kimia Shaban, Koorosh Roohi, David B. Lindell, Babak Taati
papers.evidence: 扩散变换器的免训练分辨率外推方法
papers.tldr: 扩散Transformer在训练分辨率外生成时性能下降。现有方法采用统一的RoPE缩放，导致全局结构与细粒度细节的权衡。本文提出SEGA，根据每个去噪步骤的潜变量频谱能量，动态调整不同RoPE组件的注意力缩放。在多个高分辨率目标上，SEGA一致优于现有无训练方法，提升了结构连贯性和细节保真度。
papers.abstract_en: Diffusion transformers (DiTs) have emerged as a dominant architecture for text-to-image generation, yet their performance drops when generating at resolutions beyond their training range. Existing training-free approaches mitigate this by modifying inference-time attention behavior, often through Rotary Position Embeddings (RoPE) extrapolation combined with attention scaling. However, these strategies apply a uniform and content-agnostic scaling across RoPE components with distinct frequency characteristics, inducing a trade-off between preserving global structure and recovering fine detail. We introduce SEGA, a training-free method that dynamically scales attention across RoPE components according to the latent's spatial-frequency structure at each denoising step. This adaptive scaling improves both structural coherence and fine-detail fidelity. Experiments show that SEGA consistently improves high-resolution synthesis across multiple target resolutions, outperforming state-of-the-art training-free baselines.

papers.title_en: Trajectory-Consistent Calibration for Cache-Accelerated Diffusion Models
papers.authors: Mingyu Liang, Dingkun Xu, Jingwei Xu
papers.evidence: 无需训练的缓存加速扩散模型采样校准方法
papers.tldr: 缓存加速扩散模型会重用中间表征，导致表征偏差并降低生成质量。本文提出免训练的轨迹一致校准（TCC），通过离线迭代校准缓存表征，使得每次校准考虑前次校准导致的轨迹偏移。在PixArt-alpha和DiT-XL/2上，TCC一致改善FID，例如FORA加速下FID从29.83降至27.35，略超完整计算基线。该方法无需修改采样策略，可即插即用于多种缓存加速方法。
papers.abstract_en: Diffusion Transformers require repeated denoiser evaluations during iterative sampling, making inference computationally expensive. Cache-based acceleration reduces this cost by reusing intermediate representations across denoising steps, but can introduce representation deviations and degrade generation quality. In this paper, we analyze these deviations and show that effective calibration should consider both the direct mismatch caused by reuse and the subsequent trajectory shift induced by earlier corrections. To address this challenge, we propose Trajectory-Consistent Calibration (TCC), a training-free method that calibrates cached representations toward their full-computation counterparts. Specifically, rather than estimating all calibration priors from a single uncorrected cache trajectory, TCC uses an offline iterative procedure so that each prior accounts for the trajectory shift induced by preceding calibrations. Experiments on PixArt-alpha and DiT-XL/2 show that TCC consistently improves FID across representative cache-based acceleration methods while preserving their underlying reuse policies. Notably, in a representative PixArt-alpha cache-acceleration setting based on FORA, TCC reduces FID from 29.83 to 27.35, slightly surpassing the full-computation baseline.

papers.title_en: Geometry-Correct Diffusion Posterior Sampling with Denoiser-Pullback Curvature Guidance and Manifold-Aligned Damping
papers.authors: Seunghyeok Shin, Minwoo Kim, Dabin Kim, Hongki Lim
papers.evidence: 免训练优化方法，通过曲率引导和阻尼改进扩散后验采样
papers.tldr: 扩散后验采样通常依赖手工调节的引导权重，在算子曲率较大时易不稳定。本文提出几何校正方法，用阻尼高斯-牛顿更新替代标量引导，通过去噪器拉回似然梯度，采用单向曲率模型和秩一阻尼避免前向雅可比计算，结合矩阵自由GMRES高效求解。在FFHQ、ImageNet和加速MRI重建上，该方法在PSNR/SSIM/LPIPS指标上达到竞争力，速度显著优于多数基线。该方法无需手动调节权重，稳定且高效，为扩散模型后验采样提供了新范式。
papers.abstract_en: Diffusion posterior sampling conditions diffusion priors on measurements, but data-consistency updates are typically scaled by hand-tuned guidance weights and can destabilize sampling under stiff, operator-dependent curvature. We replace scalar guidance with a per-noise-level damped Gauss--Newton correction computed in diffusion-state coordinates. The correction pulls likelihood gradients back through the denoiser, uses a one-sided curvature model that avoids forward denoiser Jacobians, and applies diffusion-calibrated rank-one damping aligned with the denoiser residual. Each correction is solved with matrix-free GMRES using automatic differentiation, and sampling proceeds with a variance-preserving Langevin transition with a closed-form drift/noise split. On FFHQ and ImageNet across inverse problems, it achieves competitive PSNR/SSIM/LPIPS while running markedly faster than most of the compared baselines; on accelerated MRI reconstruction, it achieves the best PSNR/SSIM among the compared baselines.

papers.title_en: Fisher-Preserving Guidance: Training-Free Manifold Constraints for Safe Diffusion Control
papers.authors: Hao Ren, Zetong Bi, Yiming Zeng, Le Zheng, Zhi Li, Zhaoliang Wan, Lu Qi, Hui Cheng
papers.evidence: 扩散模型的免训练推理方法
papers.tldr: 扩散模型在视觉导航路径预测中有效，但标准采样和测试时引导可能产生不可靠轨迹。本文提出 Fisher Preserving Guidance with Outer Product Span Projection，一种无需训练的推理方法，通过低秩 Jacobian 分解计算 Fisher 保持更新，避免分布外动作导致的 Fisher 漂移，同时优化任务目标。方法仅需单次反向传播，支持实时应用。在 Maze2D、PushT 及仿真/实物机器人导航实验中，该方法一致优于强 Diffusion Policy 基线，无需额外训练。
papers.abstract_en: Diffusion models are effective for waypoint prediction in visual navigation, but standard sampling and test time guidance can produce unreliable or inefficient trajectories when updates drift off the training manifold. We propose Fisher Preserving Guidance with Outer Product Span Projection, a training-free inference method that avoids large Fisher drift associated with off-distribution actions while optimizing a task objective. Our method computes the Fisher-preserving update via a low-rank Jacobian factorization, requiring only a single backward pass per step and enabling real-time use. We further introduce Truncated Fisher Denoising Sensitivity as an uncertainty signal and use it for robust multi-sample action blending. Experiments on toy and realistic navigation benchmarks, including Maze2D with TSDF-based guidance, PushT with official Diffusion Policy weights, and visual navigation in simulation and on real robots, demonstrate consistent improvements in performance over strong diffusion-policy baselines without additional training.

papers.title_en: RT-Lynx: Putting the GEMM Sparsity In a Right Way for Diffusion Models
papers.authors: Xing Cong, Hanlin Tang, Kan Liu, Lan Tao, Lin Qu, Chenhao Xie
papers.evidence: 激活稀疏化实现扩散模型免训练推理加速
papers.tldr: M半结构化稀疏更鲁棒，因此提出从权重稀疏化转向激活稀疏化的RT-Lynx。该方法对激活施加N:M稀疏化并采用误差补偿，定制优化CUDA内核，在线性层平均加速1.55倍，且保持生成质量。
papers.abstract_en: Diffusion Transformers (DiT) achieve strong performance in image generation but incur substantial inference costs. While prior work has reduced this cost via quantization and distillation, semi-structured sparsity, which can nearly halve FLOPs, remains underexplored. A key reason is that most existing approaches focus on weight sparsification, and pruning 50% of the weights can remove critical model capacity and degrade generation quality. Our study, however, shows that DiT activations are intrinsically sparse and significantly more robust to N:M semi-structured sparsification than weights. Motivated by this observation, we advocate a paradigm shift from weight sparsification to activation sparsification. We propose RT-Lynx, which applies N:M sparsification to activations and incorporates error-compensation techniques to mitigate accuracy loss. We further implement highly optimized CUDA kernels tailored to this setting, achieving up to a 1.55x speedup on average in linear layers. Extensive experiments across multiple diffusion models demonstrate that our method preserves the generation quality of the original models while substantially accelerating inference.

papers.title_en: Stage-wise Distortion-Perception Traversal in Zero-shot Inverse Problems with Diffusion Models
papers.authors: Jiawei Zhang, Ziyuan Liu, Leon Yan, Zhenyu Xiao, Yuantao Gu
papers.evidence: 扩散模型逆问题中免训练的失真-感知权衡遍历
papers.tldr: 扩散模型在零样本逆问题中面临失真与感知质量的固有权衡。本文提出MAP-RPS框架，通过先MAP估计低失真初始化、再带噪后验采样提升感知质量，实现推理时灵活遍历D-P折中。理论分析证明两阶段有效性，并扩展至潜在空间LMAP-RPS。实验表明该方法在多种任务上实现更优的D-P遍历，且作为高效求解器表现强劲。
papers.abstract_en: The distortion-perception (D-P) tradeoff is a fundamental phenomenon of Bayesian inverse problems, which characterizes the inherent tension between distortion performance and perceptual quality. Enabling flexible traversal of the D-P tradeoff at inference time is crucial for practical applications. Despite the recent success of diffusion models in zero-shot inverse problem solving, efficient and principled strategies for D-P traversal in diffusion-based inverse algorithms remain inadequately characterized. In this paper, we propose a stage-wise framework for realizing D-P traversal using a single diffusion model in zero-shot inverse problems. Our proposed method, termed MAP-RPS, starts with an MAP estimation stage that approximates the MMSE solution and provides a low-distortion initialization, followed by a re-noised posterior sampling stage that progressively improves perceptual quality. We provide theoretical analyses for both stages, establishing the validity and effectiveness of the proposed design. Furthermore, we extend MAP-RPS to the latent space, yielding LMAP-RPS, which enjoys broader applicability by leveraging large-scale pre-trained latent diffusion backbones. Extensive experiments demonstrate that MAP-RPS and LMAP-RPS enable more effective D-P traversal on various tasks, while also exhibiting strong performance as efficient solvers for real-world inverse problems.

papers.title_en: Spectral Guidance for Flexible and Efficient Control of Diffusion Models
papers.authors: Gabriel Moreira, Manuel Marques, João Paulo Costeira, Chenyan Xiong
papers.evidence: 基于频谱引导的扩散模型免训练控制
papers.tldr: 扩散模型的控制通常需要重训练或反向传播，效率低下。本文提出Spectral Guidance框架，通过学习条件期望算子的奇异函数构建谱基，将标签、CLIP嵌入或掩码等引导信号直接投影到采样轨迹上。在CIFAR-10上，条件准确率比最强无训练基线提升37%，采样速度提升4倍，且无需辅助模型即可实现空间控制。该方法揭示了生成过程中的相变，确定了最优引导时间窗口。
papers.abstract_en: We introduce Spectral Guidance, a framework for controlling diffusion models by leveraging the intrinsic geometry of the generative process. As data is progressively corrupted by noise, only a small number of features remain informative for control. We characterize them as the singular functions of a conditional expectation operator and show that they can be learned via a self-supervised objective. Once recovered, this basis enables the projection of arbitrary guidance signals, such as labels, CLIP embeddings, or masks, directly onto the sampling trajectory. This approach allows for stable, high-fidelity control without retraining or denoiser backpropagation during sampling. Empirically, we improve conditional accuracy on CIFAR-10 by 37 percentage points over the strongest training-free baseline while offering $4\times$ faster sampling. Moreover, the same representations that support label and CLIP guidance also enable spatial control, such as mask-based guidance, without auxiliary models. Finally, our framework reveals a phase transition in the generative process, pinpointing the optimal time window for effective guidance.

papers.title_en: AI-T2I: Aggregating-and-Isolating Cross-Attention to Diffusion Models for Text-to-Image Synthesis
papers.authors: Shipeng Cao, Biao Qian, Haipeng Liu, Yang Wang, Meng Wang
papers.evidence: 改进扩散模型文本到图像的对齐
papers.tldr: 扩散模型在文本到图像合成中，由于逆向过程中交叉注意力图对齐不精确，生成图像常与文本描述不符。现有研究多关注不同主体间注意力区域重叠问题，但对同一主体内部注意力分散问题关注不足。本文提出AI-T2I方法，首先利用聚合损失识别并整合分散的同一主体注意力，从而间接缓解重叠问题；再通过隔离损失显式分离不同主体间的注意力区域，实现精准对齐。实验表明，AI-T2I在多个标准数据集上超越现有最佳方法，且在可控布局生成和个性化生成等任务中也表现优异。
papers.abstract_en: Text-to-image synthesis has made significant progress, benefiting from the strong generative capabilities of diffusion models. However, these models struggle to achieve precise text-to-image alignment within cross-attention maps during the denoising process. Existing works primarily focus on inter-subject-token activations (i.e., cross-attention scores) overlap for different subjects, overlooking the intra-subject-token activations scattering issue for identical subjects. In this paper, we propose an Aggregating-and-Isolating cross-attention approach to diffusion models for Text-to-Image synthesis, dubbed AI-T2I. Technically, to address the scattering issue, we devise an aggregation loss to identify and consolidate the scattered intra-token activations, which implicitly helps mitigate the potential overlap issue. Upon that, an isolation loss is further introduced to push the inter-token activations apart, thus fulfilling precise text-to-image alignment. Extensive experiments on various benchmarks demonstrate the superiority of AI-T2I over the state-of-the-art works for text-to-image synthesis. Furthermore, our AI-T2I exhibits excellent generalization across other tasks, e.g., controllable layout generation and personalized generation.

papers.title_en: AI-T2I: Aggregating-and-Isolating Cross-Attention to Diffusion Models for Text-to-Image Synthesis
papers.authors: Shipeng Cao, Biao Qian, Haipeng Liu, Yang Wang, Meng Wang
papers.evidence: 改进扩散模型文本到图像的对齐
papers.tldr: 文本到图像合成中，扩散模型的交叉注意力图存在同一主题内激活分散和不同主题间激活重叠的问题。现有方法只关注后者，忽视了前者。本文提出AI-T2I方法，通过聚合损失整合分散的同一主题激活，并引入隔离损失分离不同主题的激活，实现精确对齐。实验在多个基准上超越现有方法，并泛化到可控布局生成和个性化生成。
papers.abstract_en: Text-to-image synthesis has made significant progress, benefiting from the strong generative capabilities of diffusion models. However, these models struggle to achieve precise text-to-image alignment within cross-attention maps during the denoising process. Existing works primarily focus on inter-subject-token activations (i.e., cross-attention scores) overlap for different subjects, overlooking the intra-subject-token activations scattering issue for identical subjects. In this paper, we propose an Aggregating-and-Isolating cross-attention approach to diffusion models for Text-to-Image synthesis, dubbed AI-T2I. Technically, to address the scattering issue, we devise an aggregation loss to identify and consolidate the scattered intra-token activations, which implicitly helps mitigate the potential overlap issue. Upon that, an isolation loss is further introduced to push the inter-token activations apart, thus fulfilling precise text-to-image alignment. Extensive experiments on various benchmarks demonstrate the superiority of AI-T2I over the state-of-the-art works for text-to-image synthesis. Furthermore, our AI-T2I exhibits excellent generalization across other tasks, e.g., controllable layout generation and personalized generation. Our code is available at https://github.com/Hatter77/AI-T2I.

papers.title_en: Concept Unlearning via Cross-Attention Activation Projection for Diffusion Models
papers.authors: Saemi Moon, Suhyeon Jun, Seoyeon Lee, Dongwoo Kim
papers.evidence: 免训练的闭式交叉注意力权重编辑用于概念擦除
papers.tldr: 现有封闭式概念擦除方法使用锚点提示的文本嵌入表示目标，但改写提示可轻易绕过编辑。本文提出PURE方法，在交叉注意力激活空间表示目标，通过去噪轨迹捕获每层激活构建遗忘和保留基，对交叉注意力键值权重施加单一线性投影。在包含艺术风格、知识产权、名人、NSFW等十种概念的综合基准上，PURE显著降低改写和对抗提示下的目标泄露，同时保留概念性能接近未编辑模型，实现了最优的遗忘-保留权衡。
papers.abstract_en: Concept unlearning aims to erase a target concept from a pretrained text-to-image diffusion model without retraining. Closed-form methods are attractive in this setting because they apply a single deterministic edit to the cross-attention weights and add no inference-time cost. Existing closed-form methods, however, represent the target concept through the text encoder's response to a few short anchor prompts that name it, and paraphrased prompts that evoke the concept without naming it consistently bypass the edit. We argue that the target should instead be represented in the cross-attention activation space. Text embeddings describe the user's prompt, while cross-attention activations describe what the model is about to render, and the latter generalize to paraphrase the anchor templates do not cover. Building on this observation, we propose PURE (Projection in U-Net Rendering for Erasure), a closed-form method that builds the forget and retain bases from per-layer cross-attention activations captured along a short denoising trajectory and applies a single linear projector to the cross-attention key and value weights. On a recent holistic concept-unlearning benchmark covering ten concepts across artistic style, intellectual property, celebrity, and NSFW categories, PURE significantly reduces target leakage under paraphrased and adversarial prompts while preserving retain concepts close to the unedited model, yielding the best overall forget-retain trade-off among evaluated methods.
